name_cn:
M83587 Silver Buckle
Exquisite embossed Monogram pattern highlighted, reinterpreted with pink Monogram Unplant leather, the exclusive 'Portefeuille Lisa' of the season. A small wallet that fits neatly into bags and pockets, featuring multiple pockets and card slots, decorated with a LV circle pull in the zippered coin pocket.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm
